description: Rogue Frontier Patch 2 (26 February 2025) — Season 25 Winner Statues, Portal Towns as Home, HQ Booster cooldown reduction, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Axes, Bows, Daggers, Fire Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Swords, War Gloves, Helmets, Shoes, Mounts), Fixes.

sections.heading: Season Winner Statues Added
sections.description: Statues for Season 25 winners PIVAS, Upper Class, and Take Care are now viewable in each server's Conqueror's Hall.
sections.searchable_text: Season 25 Winner Statues PIVAS Upper Class Take Care Conquerors Hall

sections.heading: Changes
items: Portal Towns can now be set as Home; players receive a warning when leaving a Portal Town for the Outlands if the Homesick debuff will be triggered

HQ Hideout Booster cooldown reduced from 90 days to 60 days (reflects new shorter Guild Season duration); guilds that already used their Booster this season have their cooldown also reduced by 30 days
Smuggler Coins no longer leave trash when destroyed
Trash once again has a 100% destruction rate when killed or ejected from the Roads of Avalon
Added new Albion Journal missions for Kill Trophies in the Social & Guild category
sections.searchable_text: Changes Portal Towns Home Homesick debuff Outlands HQ Hideout Booster cooldown 90 60 days Guild Season Smuggler Coins trash Roads of Avalon 100% destruction Journal Kill Trophies Social Guild

subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Toxic Reaction Pest Lizard removed

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Dodge (all T4+ Shoes): Fixed issue where immunity could be purged
Interrupt (Swords): Fixed issue where the buff icon did not match the spell icon
Toxic Cloud, Energy Cloud, Boulder Crash, Sky's Fury, and Infernal Boulder now have more accurate spell indication areas

Multiple UI fixes: Guild Rights Management sorting, Bank Overview tier filter, Rankings UI order, T3 weapon abilities display, Hellion Hood spell order, Marketplace Average Price/Market History, travel cost display, region map City Plot details, Arena Match invitation ESC key, [Controller] Marketplace category filters
Fixed issue where missions to free Captured Smugglers would not grant progress to party members
Fixed issue where missions to defeat Ghouls and Brawlers did not count all types
Fixed issue where defeating Archers in Avalonian Dungeons counted towards the wrong Journal mission
Fixed issue where items recovered to a city bank could not be accessed from a corresponding island bank
Fixed issue where the Smuggler's Den and Hideout Fame buffs could stack
Fixed issue where having an Awakened Item in equipment or inventory would trigger spell cooldowns when changing regions
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
